data.name: Unbreakable Love
data.detailed_description:
💙 Unbreakable Love 💙

Unbreakable Love is a story-driven visual novel focused on romance, temptation, and relationship choices.

Tom and Sarah are a happily married couple returning to the island where Tom grew up, expecting a relaxing honeymoon escape. Instead, they find themselves surrounded by familiar faces from Tom’s past, unresolved rivalries, and an atmosphere that encourages freedom, desire, and emotional risk.

As the story unfolds, players guide Tom and Sarah through conversations, encounters, and decisions that shape their relationship. Each choice influences how the couple responds to temptation, trust, jealousy, and intimacy — determining whether their bond grows stronger or slowly begins to fracture.

Will their love remain unbreakable…
or will this journey change them forever?

FEATURES

  • Story-driven visual novel with a strong focus on character relationships

  • Player choices that affect dialogue, scenes, and relationship outcomes

  • Multiple story paths and endings based on decisions

  • Romantic and dramatic narrative themes

  • High-quality character artwork and illustrated scenes

  • Designed for players who enjoy mature, emotional storytelling

data.short_description: A story-driven hotwife/nts visual novel where player choices shape a married couple’s relationship as they face temptation, trust, lust and desire on a fateful island getaway.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 8.1
  • 處理器: 64 bit
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X Mavericks 10.9.5
  • 處理器: 64 bit Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 5 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGLR
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 64 bit
  • 記憶體: 5 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
